prompt: I'm buying a second property for £650,000. How much stamp duty do I owe?
expected_output: Additional property SDLT with 5% surcharge: £52,250 total including surcharge

assertions.text: Response identifies this as additional property with 5% surcharge
Response provides exact total figure (not a round number)
Response shows the surcharge as separate from base SDLT
Response uses post-April 2025 standard rates (nil band £125,000)
